properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I first felt your presence, deep down in my heart How my soul rejoiced, as you filled me with hope. A fountain of tears washed, ‘way all my fears Now I sing Hallelujah, praise God evermore!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Into thy chamber, be free Holy Spirit, Speak to me gently, as I close the door. Heavenly Lover, let thy presence hover. Shekinah unending, is all I long for.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And I reach out to you Lord, to know you – my desire I’ll read and learn your words, as they are my fire. As your powr’ flows through me, a mighty river I’ll sing hallelujah, praise God evermore!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sweet Lamb of God, sacrificed at the altar Your blood made a safe path, so we may walk free. My Holy Father, Oh Holy Spirit, we worship and thank you Now I sing Hallelujah, praise God evermore!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Into thy chamber, one more time again Back to the moment, where it first began. Into thy bosom, till new depths I behold Your arms caressing, and restoring my soul.
